content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed with 10 CNC positions all carrying no SL/target — top priority is locking in risk via MODIFY on winners and assessing laggards. Broader market mixed but multiple held names (PNBHOUSING, TORNTPOWER, NESTLEIND, AUBANK, ADANIPOWER) are up strongly on catalysts; power/PSU bank/FMCG themes showing defensive rotation. With 46 min to close and deployment hysteresis triggered, no new entries — focus entirely on position management.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 72.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry Rs 81.50 near the day's high region after a gap-down session; CMP 77.27. Thesis intact — Q4 PAT +34.9% YoY, CASA 52.5% sector-leading, HDFC Sec TP Rs 90. Setting SL at Rs 72 (below recent swing low 70.31 area, ~5.8% below CMP) and target Rs 88 (near HDFC Sec TP Rs 90, prior 52W high area). R:R from CMP: 10.7/5.27 = 2:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +10.6% today on strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%). Multiple broker upgrades (ICICI Sec Rs 1,350, MS Rs 1,160, MOSL Rs 1,200). Trailing SL to Rs 955 (below today's low 981, ~4.8% from CMP) locks in small gain above breakeven/entry Rs 984. Target Rs 1,140 near 52W high Rs 1,141.90. R:R ~2.7:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge — small loss 0.8%. Gold structurally supported by Goldman/JPM bullish targets, INR weakness, central bank buying. SL Rs 119 (below SMA 20 Rs 121.92 and recent consolidation low, ~4.2% below CMP). Target Rs 135 (prior resistance, 8.7% upside). R:R ~2:1. Kept as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1650.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 4.9%, broke to new 52W high Rs 1736. Trail SL to entry Rs 1650 = breakeven lock. Target Rs 1850 (~7% upside, below analyst consensus Rs 2,000-2,300). Nabha acquisition + JERA LNG SPA + summer peak demand catalysts intact. R:R from CMP ~1.5:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1510.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +9.86% today on blockbuster Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%, 18% volume growth — best in FMCG). Fresh 52W high. SL Rs 1355 (below entry Rs 1412.94, ~3.8% below CMP, near recent breakout zone). Target Rs 1510 (~7% upside). Valuation rich but momentum + earnings beat strong. R:R ~1.8:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1000.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Broke 52W high today (+5.85%). Q4 results on 27-Apr is binary — setting SL Rs 1000 (just below entry Rs 1049 and today's breakout zone) to protect capital through event. Target Rs 1150 (~9% upside). Universal bank transition is structural re-rating catalyst. Exit before or after Q4 depending on print."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "new_target": 735.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Volume surge 3.7x, broke 52W high Rs 685. However supplementary research flags BEARISH: 2 open USFDA warning letters (Gagillapur, Telangana) + 4 fresh Form 483 observations at Chantilly VA facility. Q4 results 29-Apr. SL Rs 650 (~5.5% below CMP, above recent breakout) — exit before Q4 if not hitting target. Target Rs 735 (~7% upside). R:R ~1.3:1 — thin, will tighten aggressively."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Up 6.55% today on defensive FMCG bid. Q4 results 30-Apr is the binary catalyst. SL Rs 2280 (~4.1% below CMP, below entry Rs 2372, below today's low 2336 slightly wider for event). Target Rs 2520 (~6% upside, mid-range of analyst consensus). R:R ~1.4:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Marginal loss -0.4%. Stock near 52W high Rs 400.85 but JM Financial expects Q4 generation -7% YoY — softest in cohort. Results 15-May may fall outside max hold. SL Rs 385 (~4.4% below CMP, below SMA 20 Rs 377.98 cushion). Target Rs 435 (near top of analyst range). R:R ~1.6:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 199.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "All-time high today (+6.7%). Up 40% last month — extended. Q4 results 29-Apr binary. JM Financial #1 summer pick but BSE short-term ASM overhang + RSI extended. SL Rs 199 (just below entry Rs 214 — ~7% below CMP, accommodates volatility). Target Rs 235 (~10% upside). Cluster note: TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER = 3 power names, combined ~17% of capital — at cluster limit, NOT adding more (rejecting ADANIENSOL)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 72.00,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post-Q4 beat. Today's -5.2% drawdown is post-result profit-taking from fresh 52W high. SL Rs 72 gives room; exit if breaks."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Strongest winner today. Trail SL up below today's low to lock in above breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; minor drawdown; maintain exposure."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1650.00,
      "reasoning": "New 52W high — move SL to breakeven to free up psychological capital while letting winner run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Blockbuster Q4 drove +9.86% move; just entered essentially flat. Let the earnings-driven move play out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1000.00,
      "reasoning": "52W high breakout; Q4 on 27-Apr is the key binary event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "reasoning": "Volume breakout but USFDA overhangs — watching closely; willing to exit if SL breaks."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive rotation; Q4 on 30-Apr is catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 385.00,
      "reasoning": "Near 52W high; generation weakness risk but regulated earnings stable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 199.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended rally; Q4 on 29-Apr is binary. At entry breakeven — let it work."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DEEPAKNTR: top gainer +12.64% but BEARISH research (PE premium, PC resin oversupply, brokerage REDUCE TP Rs 1,354 below CMP) — pass. ADANIENSOL: power cluster full (3 names already); skip despite Q4 tonight. WIPRO: buyback floor Rs 250 provides support but Q1 guidance -2% to 0% CC is weak; monitor post-INFY result. OFSS/PIRAMALFIN/DRREDDY/AUROPHARMA/CIPLA/GAIL/JIOFINL/INFY: no new positions today — book is 79% deployed, hysteresis triggered, next action is Q4 results-driven trimming.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book: 79% deployed, 10 positions, all carrying zero SL until today's MODIFY cycle — rectified. Power cluster at ~17% (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) — cluster cap reached, no adds. Multiple Q4 earnings events bunched 27-Apr (AUBANK) / 29-Apr (GRANULES, ADANIPOWER) / 30-Apr (HINDUNILVR) — event risk concentrated. No new entries; focus next 2 weeks is managing exits as Q4 prints land. Capital preservation mode — no churn."
}
